name: @next/ui-base-runtime-react
description: React Native bridge for kernel ui-runtime-v2
author: DexterYang

scripts.test-expo:visible: tsc -p test-expo/tsconfig.json --noEmit && RUNTIME_REACT_EXPO_HEADED=1 RUNTIME_REACT_EXPO_SLOW_MS=800 RUNTIME_REACT_EXPO_FINAL_PAUSE_MS=5000 node test-expo/runAutomation.mjs
scripts.test-expo:dual-pages:visible: tsc -p test-expo/tsconfig.json --noEmit && RUNTIME_REACT_EXPO_MODE=dual-pages RUNTIME_REACT_EXPO_HEADED=1 RUNTIME_REACT_EXPO_SLOW_MS=800 RUNTIME_REACT_EXPO_FINAL_PAUSE_MS=8000 node test-expo/runAutomation.mjs
scripts.test-expo:topology-host:visible: tsc -p test-expo/tsconfig.json --noEmit && RUNTIME_REACT_EXPO_MODE=topology-host RUNTIME_REACT_EXPO_HEADED=1 RUNTIME_REACT_EXPO_SLOW_MS=800 RUNTIME_REACT_EXPO_FINAL_PAUSE_MS=8000 node test-expo/runAutomation.mjs
